mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement, where your sense of entitlement is our top priority! Get ready to experience banking like never before!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, I walk into the Bank of Entitlement, feeling like the VIP that I am, when suddenly I see a line. A line! Can you believe it? I saunter up to the teller and demand to speak to the manager because waiting in a line is beneath me. I mean, who do they think I am, a regular customer? The manager rushes over, looking flustered, and I lay it on thick about how my time is far too valuable to be wasted like this. Before I know it, they're opening a new teller window just for me, apologizing profusely for the inconvenience. Ha! That's more like it. I make sure to let everyone in line know just how important I am as I breeze past them to the front, all while sporting a smug grin that says, "This is the treatment I deserve." And you know what? I walked out of there feeling like a true king, because in the world of Hot Josh, entitlement reigns supreme.
